rationale: Evaluates if applying mean-reversion rules only when the Hurst exponent signals anti-persistence improves rebound capture.
expected_failure_mode: The Hurst exponent is sensitive to lookback windows and may misclassify trends as random walks.
stop_conditions: Chimera fails validation or is dominated by one family
candidate family remains crowded or redundant
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Parameter sensitivity shows high variance across lookback windows.
Strategy fails to out-accumulate simple RSI mean reversion.
